# Non-generated CMM runtime behavior.
# CMM registration remains generated by the Visual Editor.
# This file only handles performance warnings and safe fallback resets.

# Performance-warning callbacks kept as scripted effects because the generated
# nve__cmm_effects callback may call them when the matching CMM setting changes.
no_void_economy__nve_debug_messages_on_changed = {
	modeu5_refresh_configuration_from_cmm_country_scope = yes
}

no_void_economy__nve_monthly_stock_check_on_changed = {
	modeu5_refresh_configuration_from_cmm_country_scope = yes
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable_map = cmm
			is_key_in_variable_map = {
				name = cmm
				target = flag:no_void_economy__nve_monthly_stock_check
			}
			"variable_map(cmm|flag:no_void_economy__nve_monthly_stock_check)" = 2
		}
		trigger_event_non_silently = modeu5_cmm_warning.2
	}
}

no_void_economy__nve_save_mode_on_changed = {
	modeu5_refresh_configuration_from_cmm_country_scope = yes
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable_map = cmm
			is_key_in_variable_map = {
				name = cmm
				target = flag:no_void_economy__nve_save_mode
			}
			"variable_map(cmm|flag:no_void_economy__nve_save_mode)" = 3
		}
		trigger_event_non_silently = modeu5_cmm_warning.3
	}
}

# Compatibility stubs for generated CMM callbacks. Runtime package selection is
# owned by the launcher/playset, so these callbacks must not mutate gameplay.
nve_cmf_activate_no_void_economy = {
}

nve_cmf_activate_good_decay = {
}

# Refreshes a script-safe UI marker from the CMM main NVE dropdown.
#
# common/scripted_guis is not allowed to compare CMM value links directly:
#
#   "variable_map(cmm|flag:<setting>)" > 0
#
# That form produces invalid-left-side / unset-scope errors during scripted GUI
# evaluation. Keep the CMM value-link read in a normal scripted effect, then let
# scripted_guis read this simple derived marker.
#
# Visibility policy:
#
#   unset/default -> visible, because nve_no_void_economy_main default_index = 1
#   value 1       -> visible
#   value 2       -> visible
#   value 3       -> hidden
modeu5_refresh_nve_main_cmm_visibility = {
	remove_global_variable = modeu5_cmm_nve_main_enabled

	if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = { has_variable_map = cmm }
		}
		set_global_variable = modeu5_cmm_nve_main_enabled
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			NOT = {
				is_key_in_variable_map = {
					name = cmm
					target = flag:no_void_economy__nve_no_void_economy_main
				}
			}
		}
		set_global_variable = modeu5_cmm_nve_main_enabled
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			"variable_map(cmm|flag:no_void_economy__nve_no_void_economy_main)" = 1
		}
		set_global_variable = modeu5_cmm_nve_main_enabled
	}
	else_if = {
		limit = {
			"variable_map(cmm|flag:no_void_economy__nve_no_void_economy_main)" = 2
		}
		set_global_variable = modeu5_cmm_nve_main_enabled
	}
}

# CMM's normal bool/dropdown widgets are disabled through CMMCanEditSetting.
# Mark planned services as requiring unrestricted tools so normal players see
# them as unavailable without relying on generated scripted_gui is_valid blocks.
modeu5_cmm_mark_planned_services_restricted = {
	cmm_set_requires_unrestricted_tools_enabled = {
		mod_id = no_void_economy
		setting_id = nve_decay_activate
	}
	cmm_set_requires_unrestricted_tools_enabled = {
		mod_id = no_void_economy
		setting_id = activate_trade_cost
	}
	cmm_set_requires_unrestricted_tools_enabled = {
		mod_id = no_void_economy
		setting_id = nve_balance_war_shorter
	}
	cmm_set_requires_unrestricted_tools_enabled = {
		mod_id = no_void_economy
		setting_id = nve_balance_war_exhaustion
	}
	cmm_set_requires_unrestricted_tools_enabled = {
		mod_id = no_void_economy
		setting_id = nve_balance_economy_location_specialisation
	}
	cmm_set_requires_unrestricted_tools_enabled = {
		mod_id = no_void_economy
		setting_id = nve_balance_economy_main_balance
	}
	cmm_set_requires_unrestricted_tools_enabled = {
		mod_id = no_void_economy
		setting_id = nve_balance_ai_strategy
	}
	cmm_set_requires_unrestricted_tools_enabled = {
		mod_id = no_void_economy
		setting_id = nve_rebel_threshold
	}
	cmm_set_requires_unrestricted_tools_enabled = {
		mod_id = no_void_economy
		setting_id = nve_rebel_war_start
	}
	cmm_set_requires_unrestricted_tools_enabled = {
		mod_id = no_void_economy
		setting_id = nve_subjects_persistance
	}
}

# Silent fallback reset for planned services. If a setting still gets toggled
# through a stale UI state, a debug tool, or an unrestricted-tools session, reset
# it to the disabled/default value without showing a popup.
modeu5_cmm_reset_nve_decay_activate = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable_map = cmm
			is_key_in_variable_map = {
				name = cmm
				target = flag:no_void_economy__nve_decay_activate
			}
		}
		remove_from_variable_map = {
			name = cmm
			key = flag:no_void_economy__nve_decay_activate
		}
	}
}

modeu5_cmm_reset_activate_trade_cost = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable_map = cmm
			is_key_in_variable_map = {
				name = cmm
				target = flag:no_void_economy__activate_trade_cost
			}
		}
		remove_from_variable_map = {
			name = cmm
			key = flag:no_void_economy__activate_trade_cost
		}
	}
}

modeu5_cmm_refresh_nve_main_enabled = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable_map = cmm
			is_key_in_variable_map = {
				name = cmm
				target = flag:no_void_economy__nve_no_void_economy_main
			}
			"variable_map(cmm|flag:no_void_economy__nve_no_void_economy_main)" = 3
		}
		remove_global_variable = modeu5_cmm_nve_main_enabled
	}
	else = {
		set_global_variable = modeu5_cmm_nve_main_enabled
	}
}

modeu5_cmm_reset_nve_balance_war_shorter = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable_map = cmm
			is_key_in_variable_map = {
				name = cmm
				target = flag:no_void_economy__nve_balance_war_shorter
			}
		}
		remove_from_variable_map = {
			name = cmm
			key = flag:no_void_economy__nve_balance_war_shorter
		}
	}
}

modeu5_cmm_reset_nve_balance_war_exhaustion = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable_map = cmm
			is_key_in_variable_map = {
				name = cmm
				target = flag:no_void_economy__nve_balance_war_exhaustion
			}
		}
		remove_from_variable_map = {
			name = cmm
			key = flag:no_void_economy__nve_balance_war_exhaustion
		}
	}
}

modeu5_cmm_reset_nve_balance_economy_location_specialisation = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable_map = cmm
			is_key_in_variable_map = {
				name = cmm
				target = flag:no_void_economy__nve_balance_economy_location_specialisation
			}
		}
		remove_from_variable_map = {
			name = cmm
			key = flag:no_void_economy__nve_balance_economy_location_specialisation
		}
	}
}

modeu5_cmm_reset_nve_balance_economy_main_balance = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable_map = cmm
			is_key_in_variable_map = {
				name = cmm
				target = flag:no_void_economy__nve_balance_economy_main_balance
			}
		}
		remove_from_variable_map = {
			name = cmm
			key = flag:no_void_economy__nve_balance_economy_main_balance
		}
	}
}

modeu5_cmm_reset_nve_balance_ai_strategy = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable_map = cmm
			is_key_in_variable_map = {
				name = cmm
				target = flag:no_void_economy__nve_balance_ai_strategy
			}
		}
		remove_from_variable_map = {
			name = cmm
			key = flag:no_void_economy__nve_balance_ai_strategy
		}
	}
}

modeu5_cmm_reset_nve_rebel_threshold = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable_map = cmm
			is_key_in_variable_map = {
				name = cmm
				target = flag:no_void_economy__nve_rebel_threshold
			}
		}
		remove_from_variable_map = {
			name = cmm
			key = flag:no_void_economy__nve_rebel_threshold
		}
	}
}

modeu5_cmm_reset_nve_rebel_war_start = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable_map = cmm
			is_key_in_variable_map = {
				name = cmm
				target = flag:no_void_economy__nve_rebel_war_start
			}
		}
		remove_from_variable_map = {
			name = cmm
			key = flag:no_void_economy__nve_rebel_war_start
		}
	}
}

modeu5_cmm_reset_nve_subjects_persistance = {
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable_map = cmm
			is_key_in_variable_map = {
				name = cmm
				target = flag:no_void_economy__nve_subjects_persistance
			}
		}
		remove_from_variable_map = {
			name = cmm
			key = flag:no_void_economy__nve_subjects_persistance
		}
	}
}

modeu5_handle_cmm_runtime_callback = {
	modeu5_refresh_configuration_from_cmm_country_scope = yes

	switch = {
		trigger = var:cmf_callback

		flag:no_void_economy__nve_no_void_economy_main = {
			modeu5_refresh_nve_main_cmm_visibility = yes
		}

		flag:no_void_economy__nve_debug_messages = {
			no_void_economy__nve_debug_messages_on_changed = yes
		}

		flag:no_void_economy__nve_monthly_stock_check = {
			no_void_economy__nve_monthly_stock_check_on_changed = yes
		}

		flag:no_void_economy__nve_save_mode = {
			no_void_economy__nve_save_mode_on_changed = yes
		}

		flag:no_void_economy__nve_decay_activate = {
			modeu5_cmm_reset_nve_decay_activate = yes
		}

		flag:no_void_economy__activate_trade_cost = {
			modeu5_cmm_reset_activate_trade_cost = yes
		}

		flag:no_void_economy__nve_balance_war_shorter = {
			modeu5_cmm_reset_nve_balance_war_shorter = yes
		}

		flag:no_void_economy__nve_balance_war_exhaustion = {
			modeu5_cmm_reset_nve_balance_war_exhaustion = yes
		}

		flag:no_void_economy__nve_balance_economy_location_specialisation = {
			modeu5_cmm_reset_nve_balance_economy_location_specialisation = yes
		}

		flag:no_void_economy__nve_balance_economy_main_balance = {
			modeu5_cmm_reset_nve_balance_economy_main_balance = yes
		}

		flag:no_void_economy__nve_balance_ai_strategy = {
			modeu5_cmm_reset_nve_balance_ai_strategy = yes
		}

		flag:no_void_economy__nve_rebel_threshold = {
			modeu5_cmm_reset_nve_rebel_threshold = yes
		}

		flag:no_void_economy__nve_rebel_war_start = {
			modeu5_cmm_reset_nve_rebel_war_start = yes
		}

		flag:no_void_economy__nve_subjects_persistance = {
			modeu5_cmm_reset_nve_subjects_persistance = yes
		}
	}
}
